ground_truth.title: Portland's Premier Silent Disco Headphone Rental Service
ground_truth.main_content: Welcome to Silent Disco Party Rentals, your go-to source for seamless silent disco experiences. We provide premium Silent Disco Headphone Rentals in Portland and surrounding areas for private and public gatherings. Our services include exceptional customer support, local savings by avoiding hefty shipping costs, premium over-ear headphones with up to 3 channels, and a Price Match Guarantee ensuring competitive rates. Each rental kit includes high-quality wireless headphones with pristine audio, long battery life, and easy channel switching, along with transmitters to connect up to three channels so guests can switch between music sources. We offer pickup and drop-off options to save time and reduce environmental impact. Our headphones arrive fully charged with 8-10 hours of playtime and arrive 1-2 days before your event. We also provide 24/7 support with QR-coded setup guides and optional DJ services at $200/hour with a 2-hour minimum. Silent discos work for outdoor parties, house parties, weddings, corporate events, movie screenings, birthday parties, nightclubs, fitness classes, school events, trade shows, and art installations. Our headphones light up in blue, red, or green based on which channel is selected, allowing easy identification of fellow dancers sharing the same musical vibe. Request a quote today to ensure your event is unforgettable!
with: Welcome to Silent Disco Party Rentals, your go-to source for seamless silent disco experiences in Philadelphia.
Experience outstanding sound quality with our over-ear headphones, tailored for Philadelphia's eclectic music scene.
A silent disco is an innovative party concept where attendees wear wireless headphones all playing the same music, with an option to switch between multiple channels.
Our headphones light up when turned on and change colors based on which channel they are on.
Each headset arrives fully charged and delivers 8-10 hours of playtime.
without: Call for a Silent Disco Rental Quote (310) 922-4721
